title: pleroma citrinum
intro: Pleroma citrinum, also known as the citron tree, is a species of flowering plant in the citrus family (Rutaceae) native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Pleroma citrinum are attributed to its high concentration of limonoids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of consuming Pleroma citrinum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Pleroma citrinum can be prepared as herbal tea, juice, or oil, and is also used in traditional medicine as a treatment for various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
